title: Patient Services Representative
description: Scripps Research is seeking a Patient Services Representative for our Milwaukee site. You'll support research participants, coordinate clinical visits, and ensure positive patient experiences. This hybrid role is central to our mission of conducting groundbreaking biomedical research that improves human health.
responsibilities: Schedule and coordinate patient appointments and clinical visits
Provide patient education and answer questions about research protocols
Collect consent forms and maintain patient documentation
Assist with screening activities and data collection
Support patient retention and follow-up communication

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; some college or healthcare experience preferred
skills: Excellent organizational and customer service skills
Flexibility and ability to work with diverse populations

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
Opportunity to contribute to scientific research
